Instead, I will provide information about Lolium, which is a genus of plants. Lolium, commonly known as ryegrass, is a perennial grass with medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Lolium is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
